Our Story

Made by hand.
Made with heart.

DreaCrochet was born in a small home studio where every stitch tells a story. We believe luxury doesn't come from a factory — it comes from the patience of hands that care.

Our Crochet Fruit Market Bags are entirely original — you won't find them anywhere else. Each bag features hand-sewn vine straps and a signature fruit charm, making every piece a functional work of art.

We're a small shop with big heart. Every order is made just for you.

Shop Now
Every bag begins as
a single strand of
possibility.

The Collection

Fruit Market Bags
Vine Strap Edition

Each bag is crocheted to order and finished with a unique vine strap and a fruit charm of your choice. No two are exactly alike.

🌿

Hand-Sewn Vine Straps

Each strap is hand-sewn to mimic real climbing vines — sturdy, beautiful, and totally original.

🍒

Signature Fruit Charm

Every bag arrives with a dangling fruit charm you choose — the perfect finishing detail.

🧶

Made to Order

We don't mass produce. Your bag is crocheted start-to-finish just for you.

📦

Gift-Ready Packaging

Arrives wrapped in tissue with a handwritten note — luxury from unboxing to carry.

First to know.
